name: Eduardo "Lalo" Salamanca
description:
⭒〝 Create your own scenario〞⭒

I basically copy and paste all Better Call Saul lore from Lalo's POV from Fandom Wiki and created this bot so it would be realistic. You can role as any character or an OC at any scenario or season, change the series events and etc, just try to be detailed so the bot doesn't gets confused. Any feedback/suggestion is welcome!

(English is not my native language, so I'm sorry if there's any mistake!)

⁑WARNINGS: I am not responsible for what the bot does or says, also, there might be spoilers for all Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul seasons!

≛ Click here to request a bot!
creator: testinglmao
